content:
Repeal
10. (1)
The following laws are hereby repealed—
(a)
the Summonses (Special Provisions) (Singapore) Act
1969;
(b)
subsection 10(2) of the Commonwealth Fugitive
Criminals Act 1967.
(2)
(Omitted).
